telegram.subtitle: Tasks and transactions live in Taska, and key notifications come to Telegram. The manager sees the business picture where the team is already located.
telegram.benefit1Desc: A new application, an overdue task or payment - immediately in Telegram.
telegram.benefit2Desc: Change deal stages and task statuses directly from the chat.
telegram.benefit3Desc: Summary of revenue and tasks in a convenient format according to the schedule.
